zh.lifeSummary: William de Somerville是William de Somerville和wife William de Somerville的兒子，於大約1120年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯。他於1140年之前與wife William de Somerville在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1161年之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Somerville是William de Somerville和wife William de Somerville的儿子，于大约1120年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯。他于1140年之前与wife William de Somerville在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1161年之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Somerville was born about 1120, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the son of William de Somerville and wife William de Somerville. He married wife William de Somerville before 1140, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 1161, in his hometown, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Somervilleは約1120年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでWilliam de Somervilleとwife William de Somervilleの息子として生まれた。1140年以前にヨーロッパでwife William de Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1161年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Somerville(은)는 대략 1120년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 William de Somerville(와)과 wife William de Somerville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1140년 이전 우럽에서 wife William de Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1161년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Somerville родился около 1120 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали William de Somerville и wife William de Somerville. Он женился на женщине по имени wife William de Somerville перед 1140 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 1161 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
